# harvester_kubeovn_vpc_nat_gateway (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harvester_kubeovn_vpc_nat_gateway" "example" {
  name   = "my-nat-gateway"
  vpc    = harvester_kubeovn_vpc.example.name
  subnet = harvester_kubeovn_subnet.example.name

  external_subnets = ["ovn-default"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name
- `subnet` (String)
- `vpc` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `external_subnets` (List of String)
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `lan_ip` (String)
- `qos_policy` (String)
- `selector` (List of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `status_external_subnets` (List of String)
- `status_qos_policy` (String)
- `status_selector` (List of String)
